items.name: Item: Cards
items.instructions: Review the cards on screen. You can use the next and back buttons to see other cards.
sentences: body|Cuerpo|My body is young and strong.
require|Requerir|Will the company require you to move to Tokyo?
wait|Esperar|Let's wait to see the movie until tomorrow.
general|General|Her novels are for a general audience.
appear|Aparecer|When you see the train appear, let me know.
toward|Hacia|In the morning look toward the East to see the sun rise.
team|Equipo|The team is ready for the big game tomorrow.
easy|Fácil|I read an easy book today.
individual|Individuo| While it's important to be an individual, it is more important to be a member of society.
full|Lleno|My parents left for a couple of days and left the fridge full of food.

items.name: Item: Listening GapFill
items.instructions: Listen and fill in the gaps
sentences: I found the [house key] in my bag.
He put the key in his [pocket] and left.
Be careful not to [drop] the glass.
We need to [search] the room for clues.
If you lose something, you can ask the [police] for help.

items.name: Item: Typing GapFill
items.instructions: Fill in the missing words or letters
sentences: I found the [house key] in my bag.
He put the key in his [pocket] and left.
Be careful not to [drop] the glass.
We need to [search] the room for clues.
If you lose something, you can ask the [police] for help.

items.name: Item: Space Game
items.instructions: Shoot the aliens by selecting the correct answer.
sentences: house key 家の鍵|house key
pocket ポケット|pocket
drop 落とす|drop
search 探す|search
police 警察|police

items.name: Item: Free Writing
items.instructions: Write about the topic below. Try to use all of the keywords from this lesson.
items.text: Write about what you would do if you lost something important, like your house key. Use words like pocket, drop, search, and police in your answer.
items.aigradefeedbacklanguage: Thank you for your response. Remember to check your grammar and try to use the keywords provided.
items.aigradeinstructions: Penalize 1 mark for each grammar mistake. Award 1 mark for each use of the keywords: house key, pocket, drop, search, police.
